---
title: "Lecture"
output: 
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```

# Geoinformatics

- Lecture materials
(https://moineco.github.io/geoinformatics/)

The course contents of geoinformatics are as below:

# International Trade & Finance

- Lecture materials
(https://moineco.github.io/international_trade_finance/)

The course contents of international trade and finance are as below:

PART 1: International Trade Theory

- The Ricardian Model
- The Heckscher-Ohlin Model
- The Standard Trade Model
- External Economies of Scale

PART 2: International Trade Policy

- The Instruments of Trade Policy
- The Political Economy of Trade Policy
- Trade Policy in Developing Countries
- Controversies in Trade Policy

PART 3: Open-Economy Macroeconomics

- National Income Accounting
- Exchange Rates and the Foreign Exchange Market
- Money, Interest Rates, and Exchange Rates
- Fixed Exchange Rates and Foreign Exchange Intervention

PART 4: International Macroeconomic Policy

- International Monetary Systems
- Financial Globalization
- Optimum Currency Areas
- Developing Countries: Growth, Crisis, and Reform

# Spatial Econometrics
- Lecture materials (In progress...)
